case_title: YOW, ANTONIO vs. MIHAILOVIC, DEJEAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOW, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT MIHAILOVIC, DEJEAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-04-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-30-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-17-1998
